src/main/java/org/main/paint/Brush.java.general_idea: Introduce a new LineBrush subclass to draw straight line segments.
src/main/java/org/main/paint/Brush.java.human_impl: public static class LineBrush extends Brush { ... gc.strokeLine(x - size / 2, y, x + size / 2, y); }

src/main/java/org/main/paint/Brush.java.general_idea: Introduce a new TriangleBrush subclass to draw equilateral triangles.
src/main/java/org/main/paint/Brush.java.human_impl: public static class TriangleBrush extends Brush { ... gc.fillPolygon(xs, ys, 3); }

src/main/java/org/main/paint/Brush.java.general_idea: Introduce a new StarBrush subclass to draw 5-pointed stars.
src/main/java/org/main/paint/Brush.java.human_impl: public static class StarBrush extends Brush { ... gc.fillPolygon(xs, ys, 10); }

src/main/java/org/main/paint/Controller..general_idea: Replaced the custom rectangle-based color palette with a standard JavaFX ColorPicker for better UX and maintainability.
src/main/java/org/main/paint/Controller..human_impl: Removed `createColorPalette()` and `HBox colorPalette`; added `ColorPicker colorPicker` and bound its value to `currentColor`.

src/main/java/org/main/paint/Controller..general_idea: Implemented stack-based undo/redo functionality for both drawing strokes and text objects.
src/main/java/org/main/paint/Controller..human_impl: Added `Stack<Image>` for brush states and `Stack<List<TextBox>>` for text states, along with `saveBrushState()` and `saveTextState()` calls.

src/main/java/org/main/paint/Controller..general_idea: Added comprehensive text editing capabilities including input, font selection, and styling.
src/main/java/org/main/paint/Controller..human_impl: Added `TextBox` management, `textMode` toggle, and controls for font family, size, bold, and italic.

src/main/java/org/main/paint/Controller..general_idea: Extended the available brush shapes to include Line, Triangle, and Star.
Enabled keyboard input for text editing and deletion of selected text boxes.
src/main/java/org/main/paint/Controller..human_impl: Added `handleKeyPressed` and `handleKeyTyped` methods to handle Delete/Backspace and character input.

src/main/java/org/main/paint/Controller..general_idea: Updated imports to support new features like Image handling, Text, and Stack data structures.

src/main/java/org/main/paint/Main.java.general_idea: Increased the initial width and height of the application window.

pom.xml.general_idea: Updated the Maven compiler release property to target Java 21.
Added the missing JavaFX graphics dependency required for the application to run.
Bumped the org.json library version to a newer release.
Added the maven-jar-plugin to configure the JAR manifest with classpath and main class.
Added the maven-shade-plugin to create an executable uber-jar with the main class.
Renamed the jlink image name from 'paint' to 'paint-app'.
Updated the main class reference in the JavaFX plugin from Main to Launcher.

src/main/resources/org/main/paint/paint..general_idea: Replaced the programmatic color palette HBox with a standard JavaFX ColorPicker control.
Added Undo and Redo buttons to the toolbar to support history management.
Added a Text Mode toggle checkbox to enable text input functionality.
Added a container for text formatting controls including font family, size, and style options.
Wrapped the canvas in a named StackPane container and increased its dimensions.

src/main/resources/org/main/paint/styles.general_idea: Added CSS styling to visually indicate when buttons are disabled.
Commented out existing color rectangle styles, likely due to UI refactoring or removal of that component.
Added CSS styling for text input fields to match the application's design language.
Added CSS styling for check boxes, including selected state colors.
